node.text: Text reads '48hrs hydrated & bright skin*', 'Fresh & bright moisturizer', 'GARNIER', '*T&C Apply'. Yellow Garnier moisturizer jar displayed with product swatch, alongside woman touching her face demonstrating skin hydration benefit.
